content: Ngl- realising morimens released around 2024 doesnt feel real-
It felt like Ive seen this game during 2022-2023 in the playstore-
Ahh oki oki- when I searched it before it said 2024 🙏😭
Like on the playstore? Or did google AI say that
I think I read the google ai by accident
It makes sense that google ai would say 2024, they only started MTL-localization at the end of 2024 so
it practically only released for global audience in 2024
Yep, no problem lol. Gotta be careful around the AI result, though it isnt like I dont also sometimes take it at face value without double checking :p
Feels like the game’s release date would be something that the ai shouldnt fuck up, but here we are lmfao
didn't the first banner literally start dec 2024
Nope. Game was around long before then. December 2024 was a couple months after mtl localization
the years are flying by, and you're getting old, jynn.
No matter how old we get, flares will always be older
The only constant in the server
Will it be funny for me to redownload r1999 and create a new acc
you cant even type properly, is this a side effect to you becoming old? <:please:1356053110375714817>
yeAh i cAn type properly whAt's it to you
uhm actually thats not how i type its always a lowercase a not a upper case 🤓
are you a hag too niko?
I call bulls. Last time we had a long talk you were talking about some old shi. Like old old shi.
well its called being raised on old shit

it means ive eaten more delicious food than you
